uses: Beast, Chains of Honor, Doom, Dragon, Last Wish, Phoenix
demand_drivers: Enigma and Infinity are two of the most wanted runewords
supply_notes: drops from Travincal, Chaos Sanctuary, Worldstone Keep, LK super chests
cube recipe from Sur + Lo is usually uneconomical

common_trade_forms: Ber for Jah + Ist (symmetric pair trading)
segment_sensitivity: ladder vs non-ladder: significant price difference
softcore vs hardcore: hardcore usually commands higher price
early vs late ladder: price declines over time
known_model_risks: Ber is well-modeled by Ist-paired trades in all segments
symmetric Jah/Ber pair trades provide cross-validation

traderie.notes: Primary source. High volume of Ist-paired trades.

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Ber is the second top-tier anchor alongside Jah. Essential for Enigma and Infinity demand.

open_questions: Does Ber/Jah ratio shift meaningfully within a ladder season?
Does Infinity demand soften later in ladder versus Enigma?
